component.name: Screenshot Hero
component.summary: Capture, annotate, and share screenshots on Linux

description.p: Screenshot Hero is a Linux-native screenshot and annotation app built with Rust, GTK4 and Libadwaita. Fully compatible with GNOME and Wayland.
It integrates with desktop portals to capture screenshots, then offers tools to annotate, redact, blur, pixelate, export and copy the result.

screenshot.caption: Screenshot Hero editing a captured image
